# Feature: User Roles (Admin/Student)

## Description
Introduce user roles to the system. At minimum, support 'student' and 'admin' roles. Admins can manage activities and view all signups; students can only sign up or unregister for activities.

## Acceptance Criteria
- User authentication and role assignment (admin/student).
- Admins can add, edit, or remove activities.
- Students can only sign up or unregister for activities.
- UI adapts based on user role.

## Motivation
User roles enable better management and security for the activity signup system.
